title: Resolution Approving and Adopting the Municipal Development Council (MDC) 2022-07 Dated June 06, 2022 Entitled ?resolution Changing the Location of the Project: Construction of Metarhizium Culture Area Amounting to P 200,000.00 Under the Cy 2021 20% Municipal Development Fund Continuing Appropriations From Silangan, Purok 2, Brgy.
